name: OpenCart Demo
notes: Public storefront, no login required. Admin at /admin/ demo/demo.

tasks.description: You are on the OpenCart demo store. Type 'iPod' into the search box at the top and submit the search. Stop once the search results page loads.
Browse the OpenCart demo storefront. Click on the first featured product on the homepage to open its product detail page. Stop on the product page.
On the Spree demo storefront, click on any product card from the homepage to open its detail page. Stop on the product page.
On Grafana Play, navigate to the Dashboards section in the left sidebar, then open any dashboard from the list. Stop once dashboard panels are visible.
On the Plausible public dashboard for plausible.io, scroll to the 'Top Pages' section and stop once it is visible on screen.
On the Discourse try-server, click on the first topic in the latest topics list. Stop once you are on the topic page reading replies.
On the Mastodon explore page, click on any status (post) to open its detail view. Stop once you can see the post's replies/thread.
On the BookStack demo, find any 'Book' from the home page or shelves and open it. Stop once the book's chapter list is visible.
On the Easy!Appointments booking page, pick any service from the Service dropdown. Stop once a service is selected and the next step is visible.
Log in to Twenty CRM with email 'noah@demo.dev' and password 'Applecar2025'. Once on the dashboard, navigate to the Companies section in the left sidebar. Stop once the companies list is visible.

name: Listmonk Demo
notes: Public archive open. Admin login likely listmonk/listmonk.

tasks.description: On the Listmonk demo, navigate to the public campaign archive (look for an Archive or Campaigns link). Stop once the archive list is visible.
